scope: MVP-4 PAPER/SHADOW actual runtime harness and dashboard display binding

hidden_defects.impact: module validator could accept an impossible runtime duration and dashboard could clamp it to 0, making invalid source data look normal
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: live remains blocked; patch prevents invalid runtime evidence from improving operator confidence
hidden_defects.ux_impact: dashboard now shows DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT error instead of a normal short-window executed panel
hidden_defects.profitability_impact: prevents invalid runtime windows from contaminating paper/shadow maturity review
hidden_defects.fix: block negative measured runtime in harness validator and dashboard status binding
